name: ヘブンバーンズレッド

detail.description:
Winner of the Google Play Best of 2022 awards: "Best Game of 2022," "User Vote Game Category Grand Prize," and "Story Category Award"!

Key's Jun Maeda's "Heaven Burns Red" tells the story of girls entrusted with their final hope.

Run across the field, experience irreplaceable everyday life, and engage in life-or-death battles in this dramatic RPG!

◆Features of Heaven Burns Red
Similar to "AIR," "CLANNAD," and "Little Busters!" Jun Maeda, the creator of Key, who has brought us numerous masterp
